steps.title: Identify similar triangles using the given angle
steps.content:
We have two triangles: $\triangle PQT$ and $\triangle RQS$, where PR and ST intersect at Q.

We are told that $\angle PTQ \cong \angle RSQ$. Since PR and ST intersect at Q, the angles $\angle PQT$ and $\angle RQS$ are vertical angles, so they are also congruent.

By the AA (Angle-Angle) similarity criterion, $\triangle PQT \sim \triangle RQS$.

steps.title: Write the proportion of corresponding sides
steps.content:
Since the triangles are similar, their corresponding sides are proportional:

$$\frac{PQ}{RQ} = \frac{TQ}{QS} = \frac{PT}{RS}$$

We know $TQ = 8400$ feet, $QS = 1400$ feet, $RS = 1600$ feet, and $PT = x$ feet (what we seek).

steps.title: Solve for x using the proportion
steps.content:
Using the proportion $\frac{TQ}{QS} = \frac{PT}{RS}$:

$$\frac{8400}{1400} = \frac{x}{1600}$$

Simplify the left side:

$$\frac{8400}{1400} = 6$$

Therefore:

$$6 = \frac{x}{1600}$$

$$x = 6 \times 1600 = 9600$$

The answer is $x = 9600$ feet.
